designSystem.styleGuidelines:
## Brand & Style

This design system embodies a professional, established, and corporate aesthetic. It strikes a balance between traditional business reliability and modern digital clarity. Drawing inspiration from structured editorial layouts and classic web frameworks, the personality is authoritative yet approachable. 

The visual style is **Corporate / Modern**, characterized by a structured grid, clear typographic hierarchies, and a palette that favors deep neutrals with purposeful splashes of color. It avoids unnecessary ornamentation in favor of functional depth, utilizing subtle shadows and precise spacing to guide the user through information-dense environments.

## Layout & Spacing

This design system follows a **fluid grid** model based on a 12-column responsive architecture. Content is housed within a centered container that adapts to screen width, utilizing standard gutters to maintain consistent internal alignment.

The vertical rhythm is defined by significant white space between major sections—specifically roughly 80px of padding—to ensure the layout feels breathable despite the information density. Mobile reflow occurs at a 1024px breakpoint, where the header transitions from a transparent, floating state to a solid, stacked layout.

## Elevation & Depth

Hierarchy is established through **ambient shadows** and tonal layering. The system avoids flat minimalism in favor of subtle tactile depth.

Key components use a specific "soft" shadow: a 3px offset with a 5px blur in a mid-gray tone (#888888). This creates a physical "lifted" effect for cards and container boxes. Background images in the hero area utilize a black overlay to ensure white text maintains high contrast, adding a layer of perceived depth between the UI and the imagery.

## Components

### Buttons
Buttons are rectangular with a 2px radius. The primary CTA (Hero Button) features a bold border and centered text, utilizing a fade-in animation for entry. Hover states should trigger the Secondary Highlight color (#d65050).

### Box Elements (.soft)
These are the primary card-like containers. They must feature a 2px border radius and the signature 3px/5px shadow. Padding is asymmetrical to accommodate specific alignment needs: 10px top, 20px right, and minimal bottom padding to let the shadow define the edge.

### Navigation
The header is dynamic. On scroll, it transitions to a 90% opaque black background. Navigation links are set in Source Sans Three at 14px, appearing white on dark backgrounds and switching to the Highlight Red on hover.

### Inputs & Fields
Fields should follow the 2px roundedness of the system. Borders should be thin and neutral, becoming primary blue on focus.

### Hero Slider
The hero area is a fixed-height container (300px) that centers typography and buttons both vertically and horizontally. It utilizes motion (fadeInRightBig) to draw attention to the primary site messaging.

Green GLASS Design System (design.md)
1. Overview


Theme: WordPress 'Sydney' theme (by aThemes)

Framework: Bootstrap (Grid layout applied)

Icon Libraries: FontAwesome 4.1.0, Dashicons
2. Color Palette
Key color values extracted from inline CSS and applied classes.
CategoryColor Code (Hex/RGBA)Application AreaPrimary Text#767676Default body text colorSecondary Text#666666Footer area text and linksHighlight (Hover)#d65050Hover color for main navigation linksAccent Blue#266289Additional description text (<small>) inside box components (.soft)White#ffffffSite title/description, navigation links, slider textBackground 1#000000Header background on mobile resolutions, header image overlayBackground 2rgba(0,0,0,0.9)Translucent background for the floating header on scrollBackground 3#1c1c1cMain sub-menu background, site footer backgroundBackground 4#252525Footer widgets area background
3. Typography
Two primary font families are loaded and used via Google Fonts.


Headings/Primary: Source Sans Pro (Weights: 400, 400italic, 600)

Body/Secondary: Raleway (Weights: 400, 500, 600)
Font Size Rules by Tag


Body Text: 14px

Main Site Title (.site-title): 32px

Site Description (.site-description): 16px

Main Menu Links: 14px

H1: 52px

H2: 42px

H3: 32px

H4: 25px

H5: 20px

H6: 18px
4. Layout & Spacing


Grid System: Utilizes Bootstrap's .container, .row, and responsive 12-column structure (e.g., .col-md-4, .col-sm-8, .col-xs-12).

Mobile Breakpoint: At screen widths of 1024px or below, the header transitions to a mobile layout (solid black background).

Key Spacing Rules:


Page Body Wrapper (.page-wrap): Top padding 83px, bottom padding 80px.

Header Background Image (.header-image): Fixed height of 300px, scaled to fit (background-size: cover).
5. UI Components


Box Elements (.soft):


Border-radius: 2px

Box-shadow: 3px 3px 5px #888888 (adds visual depth)

Spacing: Margin 20px 20px 20px 10px, Padding 10px 20px 1px 0px

Preloader: Displays a loading animation using .spinner and two bouncing elements (.pre-bounce1, .pre-bounce2) upon entering the page.

Main Hero Slider (.sydney-hero-area):


Centers text (.text-slider) and a call-to-action button (.roll-button.button-slider) over a background image.

Applies a fade-in animation (animated fadeInRightBig) to the text elements.
